title: Lugaion multiflorum
taxonomy: Lugaion multiflorum belongs to the family of flowering plants known as Ericaceae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its evergreen leaves and white, bell-shaped flowers. The Ericaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants, including heather, rhododendron, and blueberry. The classification of Lugaion multiflorum within this family reflects its unique adaptations to its environment. Further study is necessary to determine the exact classification and relationships within the Ericaceae family.
